creator: fox@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Herbert J. Skuhra from comment #9)
1. I can update the port to the latest version (0.26.0) in the ports tree, after I test it out.
2. Yes, the patches are no longer needed since these were addressed in versions greater than 0.23.0 and the current version as you mentioned is 0.25.1
3. I guess the maintainer is not active, but the port itself is something I use in my FreeBSD instance.
